title: Reference Line
plain_language_rule: Type 'Ref:' (or 'Refs:' for multiple references) in uppercase, followed by a colon, on the second line below the last line of the via block (or subject line if no via). List references using lowercase letters in parentheses: (a), (b), (c), etc. Separate multiple references with semicolons.
source_text: Type 'Ref:' or 'Refs:' in uppercase followed by a colon, on the second line below the last line of the via block or, if no via, below the subject line. Identify each reference by a lowercase letter in parentheses: (a), (b), (c), etc.
renderer_impact: Reference line must appear on the second line below the last via line or subject line. 'Ref:' or 'Refs:' in uppercase followed by a colon. References identified by lowercase letters in parentheses.
notes: The reference line uses 'Ref:' for a single reference or 'Refs:' for multiple references, followed by a colon. Each reference is identified by a lowercase letter in parentheses.
